name: papers
description: IEEE-LaTeX paper pipeline whose bibliography is generated from frontend/src/sources.ts.

scripts.gen: node scripts/gen-bib.mjs && node scripts/gen-index.mjs && node scripts/gen-versions.mjs
scripts.build: for d in */main.tex; do latexmk -pdf -cd "$d" || echo "latexmk not installed or build failed for $d"; done
